Task.title: Task
Task.description: An individual checklist item or to-do task.

id.description: The unique identifier of the task.

text.description: The content or description of the task.

completed.description: Whether the task is completed or not.

date.description: The target date for the task in YYYY-MM-DD format.

reminderTime.description: Optional reminder timestamp relative to the target date.

reminderDismissed.description: Whether the user dismissed the notification for this task.

priority.description: The custom priority tag of the task.

userId.description: The user ID of the task owner.

tasks/{taskId}.description: Cloud-synced checklist and to-do tasks owned by users.
